shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "react-hook-form useFieldArray resolver root error nested numeric index trigger remove errors" --json --top-k 5'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' src/logic/updateFieldArrayRootError.ts && sed -n '500,720p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts && sed -n '350,420p' src/useFieldArray.ts && sed -n '1000,1095p' src/__tests__/useForm/trigger.test.tsx"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1095,1195p' src/__tests__/useForm/trigger.test.tsx; rg -n \"convertToArrayPayload\" src test* || true; sed -n '1,100p' src/utils/convertToArrayPayload.ts; rg -n \"updateFieldArrayRootError\" src/__tests__"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"export default.*isObject|const isObject|function isObject\" src/utils src | head -20; sed -n '1,80p' src/utils/isObject.ts; sed -n '1,80p' src/types/errors.ts; sed -n '1,100p' src/utils/set.ts; sed -n '1,100p' src/utils/unset.ts"

/bin/bash -lc "git log --oneline -8 -- src/logic/updateFieldArrayRootError.ts && git blame -L 1,40 src/logic/updateFieldArrayRootError.ts && rg -n \"remove\\(|trigger\\('test|resolver\" src/__tests__/useFieldArray.test.tsx | head -80"
